title: linux: skip errors from the runtime kill
body:
fix a race condition where the container process could exit before the
runtime sends the signal, causing the command to fail.

Part of: https://github.com/containers/crun/issues/422

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body: @giuseppe Rebase and repush, and we can try again.  Bors gets confused and the only way I have found out of it, is to repush.
